sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91039" key="prwto/s2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">πέπρωμαι</etym>) <sense id="n91039.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">destined</tr_>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0199.tlg001:1:215" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.215</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
